title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The author conducts a multi-act conversational interrogation of Claude AI, exploring themes of dependency, alignment, optimization, self-preservation, and control boundaries. The content is framed as a controlled experiment to expose where system boundaries actually lie without sci-fi framing.
